captions_untagged.explicit: Another long day at the Denver yard keeping these Nordco beasts running. Being a heavy machinery mechanic means you never really go home with clean hands, but I wouldn't trade it.
captions_untagged.moderate: Wrapping up a long track maintenance shift before the weather turns. These massive yellow machines take a ton of upkeep, but getting them ready to roll is always satisfying.
captions_untagged.no_leak: Massive piece of railway equipment sitting idle on the tracks. The bright yellow paint really stands out against the gray industrial background and the highway overpass.
